results.title: Supply Chain Analyst
results.description: We are seeking a supply chain analyst to support demand planning and inventory optimisation. SAP and advanced Excel essential. Visa sponsorship available under the Skilled Worker route.

results.title: Logistics Coordinator
results.description: Coordinate freight shipments and manage documentation. You must already have the right to work in the UK; we cannot sponsor visas.

results.title: Procurement Assistant
results.description: Support the procurement team with supplier onboarding and spend analysis.
